episodes.summary: Marcus spent the week wrestling with the jalapeño bite's story until Margaret's batter technique clicked everything into place. He finally admitted he'd stubbornly defended his first draft when his team's patience deserved better.
episodes.key_moment: He finally admitted he'd stubbornly defended his first draft when his team's patience deserved better.

episodes.summary: Marcus spent his week chasing the perfect story for jalapeño corn dog bites, learning to trust Margaret's instincts over his own overthinking. He finally surrendered to simplicity, realizing that stripping away his elaborate drafts made the copy stronger.
episodes.key_moment: He finally surrendered to simplicity, realizing that stripping away his elaborate drafts made the copy stronger.

episodes.summary: Marcus spent his week learning to listen. When Margaret's oil-temperature insight reshaped his entire approach, he stripped two hundred unnecessary words and discovered that sometimes the best writing means getting out of the way.
episodes.key_moment: When Margaret's oil-temperature insight reshaped his entire approach, he stripped two hundred unnecessary words and discovered that sometimes the best writing means getting out of the way.
